title: Section 4A
content: 1 [4A. Centres of Institute.--An Institute, with the prior approval of the Central Government, may, by notification in the Official Gazette, establish one or more centres in different locations 2***.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 19 of 2007, s. 4 (w.e.f. 29-1-2007). 2The words “within its jurisdiction” omitted by Act 43 of 2021, s. 7 (w.e.f. 25-5-2022).
